Title: Levara

Section Title: Service Status

- Rows:

    status: Connected,
    description: Go HNSW + WAL engine
    
  - name: collections,
    status: Ready,
    
  - name: Embedded Server

    status: Connected,
    description: Model: nomic-embed-text-v2-moe http://localhost:11434/v1/embeddings
    
  - name: grpc,
    status: Listening,
    
  - name: LLM (Ollama),
    model: Qwen 3.5 local inference
    qwen:3.0.6b,
    status: Connected,
    description: http://localhost:11434/v1
    
  - name: Neo4j,
    model: Graph database
    status: Not_configured,
